stories.headline: WH Official Tells Politico Patel Is 'Likely Next' Cabinet-Level Official to Go
stories.summary: A top White House official told Politico's Dasha Burns that FBI Director Kash Patel is the likely next senior official out, calling it 'only a matter of time' as Trump tires of negative-press distractions ahead of the midterms.

stories.headline: DOJ Drops Fed HQ Renovation Probe, Clearing Tillis Hold on Warsh Confirmation
stories.summary: The Justice Department dropped its probe of the Fed's headquarters renovation, ending the leverage Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) was using to block Kevin Warsh's confirmation as the next Fed chair replacing outgoing Jerome Powell.

stories.headline: D.C. Circuit Strikes Down Trump Asylum Ban 2-1; Administration Vows SCOTUS Appeal
stories.summary: A divided D.C. Circuit panel ruled Trump illegally ended asylum processing by declaring an 'invasion' of immigrants, jeopardizing migrants' lives; the administration said it will appeal to the Supreme Court.

stories.headline: Witkoff, Kushner Travel to Pakistan as Treasury Sanctions Iran-Linked Shipping Network
stories.summary: Special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner travel to Pakistan today to restart Iran talks (with VP Vance on standby) as Treasury sanctioned ships doing business with Iran with a focus on China.

stories.headline: Shapiro Tests Political Muscle in PA Midterms — Pushing Dems to Take State Legislature for First Time in Decades
stories.summary: Gov. Josh Shapiro is using his reelection campaign to push favored candidates in competitive PA congressional primaries and to flip the General Assembly to Democrats, testing political capital that could shape his 2028 presidential outlook.

stories.headline: Treasurer Garrity Blocks $1M Payment for Security Upgrades at Shapiro's Private Residence
stories.summary: PA Treasurer Stacy Garrity — likely GOP gubernatorial nominee — declined to pay for security upgrades at Gov. Shapiro's private home after last year's attack on the official residence, citing no legal authority to use taxpayer funds on private property.

stories.headline: Brooks Leads PA-07 Dem Primary by 7 Points in Progressive Caucus PAC Poll
stories.summary: PA Professional Fire Fighters president Bob Brooks holds a seven-point lead in the Democratic primary for the 7th Congressional District in a poll sponsored by the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC.

stories.headline: PA Supreme Court Weighing Challenge to DOS Voter-Registration Match Policy
stories.summary: Potter County Commissioner Robert Rossman is asking the PA Supreme Court to overturn the Department of State's 2018 guidance that voter registration applications cannot be rejected if applicant data doesn't match government databases.

stories.headline: Philadelphia Council Adopts Nation's Most Aggressive ICE-Restriction Package
stories.summary: Philadelphia City Council on Thursday approved a high-profile legislative package restricting federal immigration enforcement, placing the city at the forefront of local resistance to Trump's deportation campaign.

stories.headline: NERC Alert: Sudden Data-Center Load Losses of 1,000+ MW Hitting the Bulk Power System
stories.summary: The North American Electric Reliability Corp. issued an alert and recommendations after a series of 'widespread and unexpected' customer-initiated load reductions in 2024-2025 dropped 1,000 MW or more off the bulk power system at a time.

stories.headline: PJM Market Monitor Opposes Waivers for Constellation's Three Mile Island Restart
stories.summary: PJM's independent market monitor is opposing waivers Constellation is seeking for the Three Mile Island nuclear restart — a directly relevant Susquehanna-adjacent fight as PJM weighs how to treat large new behind-the-meter and co-located loads.

stories.headline: New Jersey Effectively Concedes on Offshore Wind — At Least For Now
stories.summary: Heatmap reports NJ is admitting defeat on offshore wind in the near term as the Murphy administration's signature climate plank stalls under federal hostility, supply-chain costs and developer cancellations.

stories.headline: EIA: U.S. Average Retail Electricity Prices Rose 9% YoY in February
stories.summary: Average U.S. retail electricity prices climbed 9% year-over-year in February per EIA data, with industrial and commercial classes leading the jump as data-center load growth strains capacity supply.

stories.headline: NJ BPU's Guhl-Sadovy Lays Out Affordability Playbook as NJ Bills Climb 16.9%
stories.summary: BPU President Christine Guhl-Sadovy is pushing accelerated solar/storage procurement and structural cost-recovery reforms after NJ ratepayers absorbed a 16.9% YoY price increase — the steepest in the country.

stories.headline: Pirates Take Series in Milwaukee, 6-3 in 10 Innings — Reynolds Drives in 2 in 10th
stories.summary: Nick Gonzales' go-ahead single and Bryan Reynolds' two-run hit in the 10th lifted the Pirates over the Brewers 6-3 to clinch the series; Mitch Keller went 5 IP, 5 H, 3 ER, 2 BB, 6 K in his start Saturday.
